parsed_review.summary: CP00-314 (risk A, 10 units, RP09.P07.M04.S07-S16) is a descriptor-only CRM core failure binding slice pack that follows the established CP299-CP313 pattern and is fully supported by implementation, tests, contract projection, and local/Hermes validation. Verified consistency of the 10 units, deliverable distribution (failure_recovery:6, security_audit:1, implementation:1, hermes_evidence:1, fixture:1), and micro-title (Secondary Workflow Slice:10) across prompt baseline, manifest, closeout-pack-plan.json, registry CRM_CORE_CP314_REQUIREMENTS, and contracts/crm-core-contract.json. The service.js createCrmCoreCp314* functions build only frozen pure objects (no IO/DB/network/runtime); freezeCp314Result sets every write/runtime/dispatch flag false; row-level failure guards (cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, acquires_runtime_lock:false, performs_retry_runtime:false, performs_rollback_runtime:false, blocked_claim_detail_included:false, real_client_data_loaded:false) propagate through the CP312->CP313->CP314 ROW_EXTRAS spread chain. validators.js and validate-rp09-crm-core-contract.mjs deep-compare contract current_pack/no_write_attestation/failure_binding_slice_descriptor/cp314_requirements/cp314_no_write_attestation against module constants and assert coverage.valid, slice.valid, production_ready_candidate, and claude_is_final_approval:false; model.test.js asserts the same and imports via ../src/index.js (wildcard re-export satisfies index_export_check without modifying index.js). Authority boundary is preserved: manifest production_ready:false / implemented_pending_review, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, review-request read_only with Read/Grep/Glob only, and Hermes used solely as deterministic evidence/receipt metadata (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false; H09 maps to control-plane validation commands, not product runtime). Review-evidence hardening checks pass: auth-preflight exit 0 with non-empty valid JSON result, no malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped evidence, and unrelated dirty files correctly preserved and not attributed to the pack. The production_ready claim is appropriately deferred (candidate-only) pending this read-only review and human final approval; no enterprise-trust overclaim from local validation. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. As read-only independent reviewer I am confirming review-evidence quality and pack readiness, not granting final approval.
